00038 package java.util;
00039 
00040 import jelatine.VMCalendar;
00041 
00095 public abstract class Calendar
00096 {
00100     public static final int YEAR = 1;
00101 
00106     public static final int MONTH = 2;
00107 
00111     public static final int DATE = 5;
00112 
00116     public static final int DAY_OF_MONTH = 5;
00117 
00122     public static final int DAY_OF_WEEK = 7;
00123 
00128     public static final int AM_PM = 9;
00129 
00133     public static final int HOUR = 10;
00134 
00138     public static final int HOUR_OF_DAY = 11;
00139 
00143     public static final int MINUTE = 12;
00144 
00148     public static final int SECOND = 13;
00149 
00153     public static final int MILLISECOND = 14;
00154 
00158     public static final int SUNDAY = 1;
00159 
00163     public static final int MONDAY = 2;
00164 
00168     public static final int TUESDAY = 3;
00169 
00173     public static final int WEDNESDAY = 4;
00174 
00178     public static final int THURSDAY = 5;
00179 
00183     public static final int FRIDAY = 6;
00184 
00188     public static final int SATURDAY = 7;
00189 
00193     public static final int JANUARY = 0;
00194 
00198     public static final int FEBRUARY = 1;
00199 
00203     public static final int MARCH = 2;
00204 
00208     public static final int APRIL = 3;
00209 
00213     public static final int MAY = 4;
00214 
00218     public static final int JUNE = 5;
00219 
00223     public static final int JULY = 6;
00224 
00228     public static final int AUGUST = 7;
00229 
00233     public static final int SEPTEMBER = 8;
00234 
00238     public static final int OCTOBER = 9;
00239 
00243     public static final int NOVEMBER = 10;
00244 
00248     public static final int DECEMBER = 11;
00249 
00253     public static final int AM = 0;
00254 
00258     public static final int PM = 1;
00259 
00263     public static final int FIELD_COUNT = 15;
00264 
00269     protected int[] fields = new int[FIELD_COUNT];
00270 
00274     protected boolean[] isSet = new boolean[FIELD_COUNT];
00275 
00279     protected long time;
00280 
00284     protected boolean isTimeSet;
00285 
00290     protected boolean areFieldsSet;
00291 
00292 
00297     private TimeZone zone;
00298 
00303     protected Calendar()
00304     {
00305           this.zone = TimeZone.getDefault();
00306 
00307           clear();
00308     }
00309 
00315     public final Date getTime()
00316     {
00317         if (!isTimeSet)
00318             computeTime();
00319     
00320         return new Date(time);
00321     }
00322 
00328     public final void setTime(Date date)
00329     {
00330         setTimeInMillis(date.getTime());
00331     }
00332 
00337     public static synchronized Calendar getInstance()
00338     {
00339         return (Calendar) new VMCalendar();
00340     }
00341 
00347     public static synchronized Calendar getInstance(TimeZone zone)
00348     {
00349         Calendar calendar = getInstance();
00350         calendar.setTimeZone(zone);
00351         
00352         return calendar;
00353     }
00354 
00359     public long getTimeInMillis()
00360     {
00361         if (!isTimeSet)
00362         {
00363             computeTime();
00364             isTimeSet = true;
00365         }
00366         
00367         return time;
00368     }
00369 
00375     public void setTimeInMillis(long time)
00376     {
00377         clear();
00378         this.time = time;
00379         isTimeSet = true;
00380         computeFields();
00381     }
00382 
00392     public final int get(int field) throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException
00393     {
00394         // If the requested field is invalid, force all fields to be recomputed.
00395         if (!isSet[field])
00396             areFieldsSet = false;
00397       
00398         complete();
00399      
00400         return fields[field];
00401     }
00402 
00412     public void set(int field, int value) throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException
00413     {
00414         if (isTimeSet)
00415             for (int i = 0; i < FIELD_COUNT; i++)
00416                 isSet[i] = false;
00417 
00418         isTimeSet = false;
00419         fields[field] = value;
00420         isSet[field] = true;
00421     }
00422 
00429     public boolean equals(Object o)
00430     {
00431         if (! (o instanceof Calendar))
00432             return false;
00433 
00434         Calendar cal = (Calendar) o;
00435 
00436         if (getTimeInMillis() == ((Calendar) o).getTimeInMillis())
00437         {
00438             TimeZone self = getTimeZone();
00439             TimeZone oth = cal.getTimeZone();
00440             return self == null ? oth == null : self.equals(oth);
00441         }
00442         
00443         return false;
00444     }
00445 
00453     public boolean before(Object o)
00454     {
00455         if (o instanceof Calendar)
00456             return getTimeInMillis() < ((Calendar) o).getTimeInMillis();
00457         else
00458             return false;
00459     }
00460 
00468     public boolean after(Object o)
00469     {
00470         if (o instanceof Calendar)
00471             return getTimeInMillis() > ((Calendar) o).getTimeInMillis();
00472         else
00473             return false;
00474     }
00475 
00480     public void setTimeZone(TimeZone zone)
00481     {
00482         this.zone = zone;
00483     }
00484 
00489     public TimeZone getTimeZone()
00490     {
00491         return zone;
00492     }
00493 
00497     protected void complete()
00498     {
00499         if (! isTimeSet)
00500             computeTime();
00501         if (! areFieldsSet)
00502             computeFields();
00503     }
00504 
00510     protected abstract void computeTime();
00511 
00518     protected abstract void computeFields();
00519 
00523     public final void clear()
00524     {
00525         isTimeSet = false;
00526         areFieldsSet = false;
00527 
00528         int zoneOffs = zone.getRawOffset();
00529         int[] tempFields = { 1, 1970, JANUARY, 1, 1, 1, 1, THURSDAY, 1, AM, 0,
00530             0, 0, 0, 0, zoneOffs, 0 };
00531             
00532         fields = tempFields;
00533         
00534         for (int i = 0; i < FIELD_COUNT; i++)
00535              isSet[i] = false;
00536     }
00537 }
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:24 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
